summary: Iteration 26 testing complete for AI Chart Analyzer, backend refactoring (config.py + models/__init__.py), subscription plans, and 3D scanner project save/load. All 9 backend tests pass (100%), all frontend tests pass (100%). Features tested: AI Chart page at /ai-chart with upload UI and tips, PDF endpoints (ai-chart/pdf-contract, scanner3d/pdf), subscription plans API returning БАЗОВ/ПРО/PREMIUM plans with correct prices (15/35/75 EUR), 3D project save/load with shareable links, navigation with AI Анализатор in More dropdown and mobile menu.
passed_tests: Backend API Tests (9/9 pass):
✅ GET /api/ returns 200 (health check)
✅ GET /api/categories returns categories
✅ GET /api/subscriptions/plans returns БАЗОВ/ПРО/PREMIUM plans with correct prices (15/35/75 EUR)
✅ POST /api/ai-chart/pdf-contract returns 200 with valid PDF
✅ POST /api/ai-chart/pdf-contract handles empty fields
✅ POST /api/scanner3d/pdf returns 200 with valid PDF
✅ POST /api/scanner3d/projects requires authentication (401)
✅ POST /api/scanner3d/projects saves project with auth, GET returns saved project
✅ GET /api/stats returns stats
Frontend Tests:
✅ AI Chart page loads at /ai-chart with data-testid='ai-chart-page'
✅ AI Chart page header shows 'AI АНАЛИЗАТОР НА ЧЕРТЕЖИ'
✅ AI Chart upload button found (data-testid='chart-upload-btn')
✅ AI Chart tips section visible ('Какво може да анализира AI')
✅ AI Chart analyze button found: 'Анализирай с AI'
✅ AI Chart notes textarea found
✅ Subscriptions page at /subscriptions loads with 3 plan cards
✅ БАЗОВ plan displayed with 15 EUR/мес price
✅ ПРО plan displayed with 35 EUR/мес price (90% ИЗБИРАТ ТОЗИ!)
✅ PREMIUM plan displayed with 75 EUR/мес price (КРАЛСКИ!)
✅ Desktop navigation 'Още' dropdown contains 'AI Анализатор' link
✅ AI Chart nav link found (data-testid='nav-ai-chart')
✅ Mobile menu contains 'AI Анализатор' link (data-testid='mobile-nav-ai-chart')
✅ Mobile menu contains '3D Скенер' link
✅ Homepage hero button '3D Скенер' navigates to /3d-scanner
✅ 3D Scanner page loads at /3d-scanner with upload UI
✅ 3D Scanner page shows 3 upload buttons and generate button
critical_code_review_comments: 1. Backend refactoring: config.py properly extracts shared configuration (DB, JWT, auth helpers)
2. models/__init__.py correctly defines all Pydantic models
3. server.py imports from config.py and models/__init__.py - clean separation of concerns
4. SUBSCRIPTION_PLANS in config.py correctly defines БАЗОВ (15 EUR), ПРО (35 EUR), PREMIUM (75 EUR)
5. AI Chart PDF endpoint (/api/ai-chart/pdf-contract) generates proper PDF with Bulgarian fonts
6. Scanner3D project save/load endpoints correctly implement auth and shareable links
7. All navigation links properly added for AI Анализатор in both desktop and mobile menus
8. All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: Test user created via /api/auth/register for scanner3d/projects testing
